description_long: This object consists of three carrot roots, each displaying a vibrant orange color and a natural, slightly irregular cylindrical shape. One carrot features a green leafy top, with delicate, feathery leaves extending outward, while the other two have truncated tops—one with a green stub and the other with a pale, cut end. The surfaces of the carrots are matte and show subtle textural details, such as fine ridges and slight tapering toward the tips. The carrots vary slightly in size, with the largest being notably thicker and longer than the others. No visible dirt or soil is attached to the roots, and the overall appearance is clean and fresh.
description: A group of three orange carrots, one with green leafy tops, all with natural, slightly tapered shapes and clean surfaces.
description_view_0: Three carrots are shown side by side, highlighting their orange color and the leafy top on the leftmost carrot.
description_view_1: The carrots are viewed from the tip, emphasizing their tapering shapes and the leafy top's bushy appearance.
description_view_2: The carrots are aligned horizontally, showing the green leafy top in profile and the varying thickness of each carrot.
description_view_3: The carrots are viewed from the base, displaying the cut ends and the leafy top extending outward.
